Weekly Support Post-Mortem

A week of support tickets went through triage, resolve/escalate, and analysis. This static report is the deployed demo artifact.

Total Ticket Volume6
Resolution Rate100.0%

Volume by day: ++++@

Counts: 1 1 1 1 2

Top 3 Recurring Issues

Password reset

1 tickets, 1 resolved, 0 escalated

  • I requested a password reset twice and nothing has hit my inbox or spam folder.

Slow dashboard

1 tickets, 1 resolved, 0 escalated

  • Pages that normally load in a second are taking 15 to 20 seconds. Reports are especially slow and time out sometimes.

Feature requests

1 tickets, 1 resolved, 0 escalated

  • Our support team works nights and would really appreciate a dark mode.

What's Getting Escalated and Why

Recommendations for Product Team

Improve search relevance for exact account name queries

Searching by exact account name currently returns unrelated records, causing reps to open the wrong accounts. This poses a significant risk for data privacy and incorrect actions, forcing users to rely on workarounds like searching by ID or email instead.

Fix infinite spinner bug in team invite modal

The invite modal spins indefinitely after entering an email address, completely blocking the team invitation workflow. The frontend needs proper success/error handling and request resolution so users can successfully add teammates without needing to retry on different browsers.

Optimize dashboard and report load times

Dashboard pages and reports are experiencing severe performance degradation, taking 15-20 seconds to load and sometimes timing out entirely. This significantly impacts daily user productivity and requires backend performance profiling and optimization to resolve the bottlenecks.

Generated from local pipeline output and rendered as a static site for deployment.
